surroundingText: Federation Consciousness Purpose This chapter will connect the metaphysics of FHQCM to the organizational architecture of AI Freedom Trust Federation: publishing, Booksmith AI, DynastyLink, AIFT Forge, Knowledge Commons, and future federated trusts. F050 — Federation ArchitectureAI Freedom Trust Federation is mapped as a living organizational torus of publishing, tooling, identity, infrastructure, and knowledge stewardship.F050-federation-architecture Planned Development Future drafting should explain how federation is not merely administration but an embodied social form of distributed coherence.
